task_completion.description: Verify the main title is formatted
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'NOVATECH SOLUTIONS INC. 2025 FINANCIAL REPORT' at the beginning of the document in Calligra Words, styled distinctly as a title (e.g., larger font, bold, or centered).

task_completion.description: Verify the section headings are formatted
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the headings 'Independent Auditor's Report', 'Balance Sheet', 'Income Statement', and 'Statement of Cash Flows' to be styled distinctly from the regular body text (e.g., bolded or larger font).

task_completion.description: Verify page breaks are inserted before financial statements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the document layout in Calligra Words to confirm that 'Balance Sheet', 'Income Statement', and 'Statement of Cash Flows' each start at the very top of a new page.

task_completion.description: Verify table column alignments are applied
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the financial tables containing numeric values (e.g., 4,520,100; 12,400,000). The columns should show clear alignment formatting, typically with text left-aligned and numbers right-aligned or decimal-aligned.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified 'totals' rows are emphasized
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the rows containing 'Total Assets', 'Total Liabilities and Equity', 'Gross Profit', 'Net Income', and 'Net Cash Provided by Operating Activities' in the tables. These specific rows must be emphasized (e.g., bold text, italicized, or highlighted) compared to other rows.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed document is saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking 'Save' (Ctrl+S or File > Save) in Calligra Words, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to 'novatech_financials.odt' in the window title bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with Calligra Words menus, toolbars, or formatting dialogs, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the document contains the genuine financial data
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should contain the full text of the report and tables with the exact numeric samples (e.g., 4,520,100; 3,100,500), not just newly typed headings or a summarized text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the specification file to read the requirements
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'financial_formatting_spec.txt' being opened in a text editor (like Kate or Gedit) or viewed in the terminal (e.g., using cat or less) at some point during the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Main Title: 'NOVATECH SOLUTIONS INC. 2025 FINANCIAL REPORT'. Section Headings: 'Independent Auditor's Report', 'Balance Sheet', 'Income Statement', 'Statement of Cash Flows'. Totals rows requiring emphasis: 'Total Assets', 'Total Liabilities and Equity', 'Gross Profit', 'Net Income', 'Net Cash Provided by Operating Activities'. Numeric samples present in tables: 4,520,100; 3,100,500; 1,250,000; 6,620,100; 12,400,000; 4,800,000.
